title: Savings Interest Calculator
description: Compare savings interest rates across Vietnamese banks. Find the savings account that suits your needs with the best interest rates.

importantNotes.title: Important Notes
importantNotes.note1: Interest rates may change depending on each bank's policies
importantNotes.note2: Displayed rates are advertised rates, actual rates may differ
importantNotes.note3: Online deposits often have higher rates than counter deposits
importantNotes.note4: Check early withdrawal conditions before depositing
importantNotes.note5: Consider term deposits for better interest rates

noTerm.name: No-Term Savings
noTerm.description: Flexible withdrawals but lower interest rates

term.name: Term Savings
term.description: Higher rates, no early withdrawals allowed

super.name: Super Preferential Savings
super.description: Large amounts, long terms with highest rates

component.title: Savings Calculator
component.subtitle: Compare savings rates from different banks and find the best option for your money
